subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto the call of the Wronged One from the precincts of the Prison, as He standeth before the faces of the world and summoneth all unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسمع ندآء المظلوم من شطر السجن انه کان قائما امام وجوه العالم و دعا الکل الی
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to divines; to religious leaders, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @exhortations and counsels, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa], @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
